title: Just a Well
description: Adds a configurable well to generate any fluid you need!
body:
![well logo](https://i.imgur.com/O1AlIyJ.png)

The **Well** can handle all your fluid generating needs! By default, it generates up to 100 buckets of water, filling one bucket every 160-200 ticks.

More features:
 - Can be dyed any of the sixteen colors from vanilla
 - The roof rotates around the Y axis, allowing you to place it how you want
 - Plays a cranking sound when retrieving fluids with a bucket
 - Upside-down wells allow you to generate modded fluids that are lighter than air  

Plus, this mod is highly configurable! Things you can change:
 - If the cranking sound will play (default: **true**)
 - How much the well will hold (default: **100000 mb**)
 - If the well will stop working when there's more than one in the same chunk (default: **false**)
 - What fluid generates, how much, how often, and in which biome(s)  

See the [wiki](https://github.com/cubicoder/Well-Mod/wiki) for more information on how the config works.

This mod is a port of [Well well well...](https://modrinth.com/mod/well) by [Foreck1](https://modrinth.com/user/Foreck1) and [jbredwards](https://modrinth.com/user/jbredwards). All assets and art by [Foreck1](https://modrinth.com/user/Foreck1).
![well bar](https://i.imgur.com/sXxGkyo.png)
